mapper.select:
SELECT ID, PQ_NO, HQ_CARGO_ID, CARGO_NAME, HQ_YARD_ID, YARD_NAME, QUANTITY, TON, HQ_LENGTH, WIDTH, HEIGHT, VOLUME, IN_PORT_TIME, IN_PORT_NAME, OUT_PORT_TIME, OUT_PORT_NAME, STATUS, IN_SHIP_NAME, IN_VOYAGE, IN_SHIP_NAME || '_' || IN_VOYAGE "inShipVoyage", OUT_SHIP_NAME, OUT_VOYAGE, OUT_SHIP_NAME || '_' || OUT_VOYAGE "outShipVoyage", DEL_FLAG, CREATE_BY, CREATE_BY_NAME, CREATE_TIME, UPDATE_BY, UPDATE_BY_NAME, UPDATE_TIME FROM T_HQ_DATA
id = #{id}
SELECT thd.*,tht.ID "hqTallyId" FROM T_HQ_DATA thd , T_HQ_TALLY tht WHERE THD.ID = THT.HQ_DATA_ID(+) AND THT.TALLY_ID = #{tallyId}
SELECT HQ_DATA_ID FROM T_HQ_TALLY tht WHERE TALLY_ID = #{tallyId}

SELECT mwp.source_cd "sourceCd", mwp.SOURCE_nm "sourceNm", mwp.target_cd "targetCd", mwp.target_nm "targetNm" FROM M_WORK_PROCESS mwp , T_YARD_TALLY tyt WHERE tyt.PROCESS_CODE = MWP.PROCESS_CD AND tyt.ID = #{tallyId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO T_HQ_DATA(ID, PQ_NO, CARGO_NAME, YARD_NAME, QUANTITY, TON, IN_PORT_TIME, IN_PORT_NAME, OUT_PORT_TIME, OUT_PORT_NAME, STATUS, IN_SHIP_NAME, IN_VOYAGE, OUT_SHIP_NAME, OUT_VOYAGE, DEL_FLAG, CREATE_BY, CREATE_BY_NAME, CREATE_TIME) VALUES (#{pqNo, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{cargoName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{yardName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{quantity, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{ton, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{inPortTime, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{inPortName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{outPortTime, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{outPortName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{status, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{inShipName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{inVoyage, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{outShipName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{outVoyage, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{delFlag, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{loginUserId, jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{loginUserName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{now})
mapper.update:
UPDATE T_HQ_DATA SET PQ_NO = #{pqNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, CARGO_NAME = #{cargoName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, YARD_NAME = #{yardName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, QUANTITY = #{quantity,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, TON = #{ton,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, IN_PORT_TIME = #{inPortTime,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, IN_PORT_NAME = #{inPortName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, OUT_PORT_TIME = #{outPortTime,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, OUT_PORT_NAME = #{outPortName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, STATUS = #{status,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, IN_SHIP_NAME = #{inShipName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, IN_VOYAGE = #{inVoyage,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, OUT_SHIP_NAME = #{outShipName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, OUT_VOYAGE = #{outVoyage,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, DEL_FLAG = #{delFlag,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, UPDATE_BY = #{loginUserId, jdbcType=BIGINT}, UPDATE_BY_NAME = #{loginUserName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, UPDATE_TIME = #{now}
id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT tds.SHIP_NAME || NVL2(tds.SHIP_NAME,'_','') || tdsi.VOYAGE "shipVoyage", tds.SHIP_NAME "shipName", tdsi.VOYAGE "voyage" FROM T_DIS_SHIPVOYAGE_ITEM tdsi , T_DIS_SHIPVOYAGE tds, T_PRD_WORK_PLAN tpwp , T_YARD_TALLY tyt WHERE tdsi.SHIPVOYAGE_ID = tds.ID(+) AND tdsi.ID = TPWP.SHIPVOYAGE_ITEM_ID(+) AND TPWP.ID = tyt.PLAN_ID(+) AND tyt.ID = #{tallyId}
mapper.delete:
DELETE FROM T_HQ_TALLY where id in
#{item.hqTallyId}

UPDATE T_HQ_DATA
status = #{status},
IN_PORT_TIME = NULL, IN_PORT_NAME = NULL
OUT_PORT_TIME = NULL, OUT_PORT_NAME = NULL
where id in
#{id}
